n: Book 15, Chapter 11: A Father's Final Gift

steps.t: Lorniel's grave is on the northern slopes of Gorothlad, south of Nan Gurth in Angmar. Golodir has given you the location of Dúnachar and has given you…
Golodir is at Gath Forthnír in the northern reaches of Angmar. You should return to Golodir with the broken hilt of Dúnachar.
